heroHeadline: Tehran Formally Rejects Trump's Tuesday Deadline on Strait of Hormuz, Deepening Diplomatic Standoff
heroSubtitle: Iran defies US ultimatum over Hormuz control as diplomatic off-ramp efforts stall; standoff raises risk of intensified military or economic escalation.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
